from.name: from
from.description: The source space or reference of a spatial transform (e.g. `from-T1w`). Only applicable to derivative data.

to.name: to
to.description: The target space or reference of a spatial transform (e.g. `to-MNI152NLin2009cAsym`). Only applicable to derivative data.

mode.name: mode
mode.description: The interpretation of a transform file (e.g. `mode-image`). Only applicable to derivative data.

timeseries.description: A tabular file whose rows are ordered samples in register with an associated time series (e.g. fMRIPrep confounds, one row per functional volume).

xfm.description: A spatial transform mapping one space to another, typically named with `from-`, `to-`, and `mode-` entities.

dwiref.description: A single 3D volume used as the reference for a diffusion-weighted run.

trans_x__confounds.name: trans_x
trans_x__confounds.description: Estimated framewise translation along the x axis (mm).

trans_y__confounds.name: trans_y
trans_y__confounds.description: Estimated framewise translation along the y axis (mm).

trans_z__confounds.name: trans_z
trans_z__confounds.description: Estimated framewise translation along the z axis (mm).

rot_x__confounds.name: rot_x
rot_x__confounds.description: Estimated framewise rotation about the x axis (radians).

rot_y__confounds.name: rot_y
rot_y__confounds.description: Estimated framewise rotation about the y axis (radians).

rot_z__confounds.name: rot_z
rot_z__confounds.description: Estimated framewise rotation about the z axis (radians).

framewise_displacement__confounds.name: framewise_displacement
framewise_displacement__confounds.description: Framewise displacement (Power et al.), a scalar summary of head motion (mm).
